scene.setting: a dimly lit, cluttered junkyard or storage room filled with old furniture, frames, and artifacts.

objects.description: a round table with a patterned cloth, holding various antique objects.
an antique armillary sphere globe on the table.
a pile of old, thick chains on the table.
an old-fashioned lantern on the table.
numerous old and ornate mirror frames stacked in the background.
a bicycle frame is visible on the left.

audio_description: A low, sustained, ominous musical chord plays.
